name: Sweet Delights
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Allow butter to reach room temperature. Using solid margarine can also work with similar results. Place the butter in a mixing bowl and beat it with an electric mixer. Gradually add granulated sugar while continuing to beat; stir in vanilla extract and salt. Mix in the ground nuts, then combine with flour. Roll into a ball and chill for 15 minutes.
2. Break off pieces of dough and roll them between your palms to form balls about the size of a small walnut. Ensure they are not too large. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
3. Bake in a preheated oven set to 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 18-20 minutes. Remove from the oven and roll, while still warm, in powdered sugar.
Yield: Approximately 5 dozen cookies.
